publicReceiptFields.coverage_class: value from the public precommitted coverage taxonomy
publicReceiptFields.vault_commitment: keyed non-resolving commitment; never a direct hidden-source or truth digest
publicReceiptFields.public_artifact_digest: digest only of bytes already authorized for public disclosure
publicReceiptFields.aggregate_status: bounded enum with minimum aggregation cardinality
publicReceiptFields.typed_redaction_receipt: schema-bounded fields; never free-form text or arbitrary nesting
